**`updateWorkTemplatePrompt` does NOT call `enforceOpsRequest` directly or indirectly.** 

Looking at the function body of `updateWorkTemplatePrompt` (lines 46–73 of `route.ts`), it only calls:
- `prisma.opsSystemConfig.findUnique()` (Prisma ORM)

- `normalizePromptKey()` (local helper)
- `prisma.opsSystemConfig.update()` (Prisma ORM)
- `new Date().toISOString()` (native)

None of these local helpers (`asRecord`, `normalizePromptKey`, `canonicalPromptKey`, `promptKeyMatchesTemplate`) call `enforceOpsRequest` either — they are pure utility functions.

The only call to `enforceOpsRequest` in this file is in the `POST` handler (line 119), which is the caller of `updateWorkTemplatePrompt`, not the other way around. `updateWorkTemplatePrompt` itself never invokes `POST` or `enforceOpsRequest`.
